'''Usta''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Usta system/Legends|Usta system]]. It was situated in the [[Back Reach]] area of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Feena Run]] linked it to the [[Barison system/Legends|Barison]] and [[The Cometwash system/Legends|the Cometwash systems]]. A joint venture between members of the [[T'sarki]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the planet [[Kalishik]] and the [[Ardan (people)|inhabitants]] of the [[Arda system/Legends|Arda system]] oversaw energy [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on Usta, which rendered the world pitted and [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Usta was introduced in the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', authored by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]], which placed it in grid square Q-6.<ref name="TEA" />
